prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `8a371977`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 task package for `8a371977`. The rule is: treat each `0` rectangle inside the `1` scaffold as a block in a regular grid, recolor outer-ring blocks to `2`, and recolor strictly interior blocks to `3`. The `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint was used because it matched the official examples; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry. No new primitive was needed.

Implementation is in [arc2/tasks/task_8a371977/__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_8a371977/__init__.py), [arc2/tasks/task_8a371977/verifier.py#L4](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_8a371977/verifier.py#L4), and [arc2/tasks/task_8a371977/generator.py#L4](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_8a371977/generator.py#L4). The verifier classifies `0`-components by global bounding-box extremes; the generator stays in-family by sampling square canvases containing a regular scaffolded lattice of uniform rectangles, with separator thickness `1` or `2` and small border-thickness variation. I visually checked [arc2/artifacts/8a371977/previews/preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8a371977/previews/preview_01.png) and the outputs look consistent with the official family.

Validation passed end-to-end: `4/4` official examples passed, the shared build produced 1000 examples, and `1000/1000` generated examples passed the verifier wrapper. Artifacts are at [arc2/artifacts/8a371977/task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8a371977/task.json), [arc2/artifacts/8a371977/previews/originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8a371977/previews/originals.png), [arc2/artifacts/8a371977/previews/preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8a371977/previews/preview_01.png), [arc2/artifacts/8a371977/previews/preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8a371977/previews/preview_02.png), and [arc2/artifacts/8a371977/previews/preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8a371977/previews/preview_03.png).
